response.justification: Despite extensive experience, the candidate lacks relevant Java-focused project work, has only basic German language skills (a hard requirement), and has no demonstrated experience in the insurance sector or agile consulting environments, making them a poor fit for this junior role despite senior titles.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical teaching background
Proven ability to work with cloud, CI/CD, and modern architectures
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, not sufficient for client collaboration
No demonstrable Java project experience despite Java being a core requirement
Career history shows senior roles, but resume lacks alignment with entry-level consulting context
